log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+6=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:20+6=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.

→ Khenra — Winged Striker: FAIL! 28 fire damage + .
